prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为约6270名、6824名、9179名、9848名、10254名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约3984名；2025年基准位次 约10254名，较2024年再后移约406名，下行趋势明显；该校在上海市综合类招生计划2021–2023年均为13人，2024年增至16人，2025年进一步增至18人；2026年 计划回落至16人，较2025年缩招2人（约-11.1%），缩招将加剧竞争，对位次有前移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中南财经政法大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学 排名近年持续上升，2021年第65名→2026年第57名，排名提升反映学校综合实力与认可度增强，对报考热度有正面支撑；2026年高考周期内该校声誉评价为偏负 面，主要涉及师德师风事件（教授考核争议），可能对部分考生报考意愿产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第73（评价为一般），短视频曝光量中等，未出现明显热度爆发或负面舆情 放大；第五轮学科评估中，法学获评A（全国前列），应用经济学获评A-，两大王牌学科与该校在沪招生专业（法学类、会计学、经济与贸易类等）高度对应， 对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业社会热度偏热（推荐），财经/经济类专业呈分化观望态势；上海市2026年普通高考总人数约66700人，较2025年综合 类考生49276人大幅增加约35%，考生基数显著扩大将推高整体竞争烈度；该校位于湖北省武汉市，在上海市招生占比极小 （2025年18人占全国总计划比例极低），属跨省招生，上海考生对该校无显著地域偏好或排斥。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划较2025年缩招2人 、上海市考生总数大幅增加约35%以及学校软科排名持续上升等多重因素，竞争加剧是主导方向。，再结合考生规模激增和学 校排名提升的正面效应，预计2026年最低录取位次进一步前移至约9540名，区间9040–10040名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学类（含法学、民商法、涉外法治等方向）
- 会计学（含会计学、注册会计师、财务管理）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 经济与贸易类（含国际经济与贸易、贸易经济）
- 数字经济。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 管理科学与工程类（大数据方向，含信息管理与信息系统、大数据管理与应用）
- 保险学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（9040–10040名）内，建议以二档专业（经济与贸易类、数字经济）为主攻方向，一档专业（法学类、会计学）作为冲刺，三档专业（管理科学与工程类、保险 学）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<9040名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>10040名）则应以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shanghai comprehensive category were approximately 6270, 6824, 9179, 9848, and 10254, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3984 positions in the last 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 10254, a further backward shift of about 406 positions compared to 2024, indicating a clear downward trend; the enrollment plan for this university in Shanghai comprehensive category was 13 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 16 in 2024, and further increased to 18 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is set to decrease to 16 students, a reduction of 2 students (about -11.1%) compared to 2025, which will intensify competition and exert upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhongnan University of Economics and Law is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been rising in recent years, from 65th in 2021 to 57th in 2026, reflecting an enhancement in the university's comprehensive strength and recognition, positively supporting application popularity; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (professor assessment controversy), which may mildly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 73rd (evaluation: average), with moderate short video exposure, no obvious popularity explosion or negative amplification; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, law was rated A (top in the country), applied economics was rated A-, and these two flagship disciplines highly correspond to the university's enrollment majors in Shanghai (law, accounting, economics and trade, etc.), strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major is socially hot (recommended), while finance/economics majors show a divergent wait-and-see trend; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Shanghai ordinary college entrance examination is about 66,700, a significant increase of about 35% compared to the 49,276 comprehensive category candidates in 2025, and the substantial expansion of the candidate base will push up overall competition intensity; the university is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, with a very small enrollment proportion in Shanghai (18 students in 2025, accounting for an extremely low proportion of the national total plan), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, and Shanghai candidates have no significant regional preference or aversion to this university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the reduction of 2 students in the 2026 enrollment plan compared to 2025, the significant increase of about 35% in the total number of Shanghai candidates, and the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking, intensified competition is the dominant direction. Combined with the positive effects of the surge in candidate numbers and the university's ranking improvement, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will further move forward to about 9540, with a range of 9040–10040.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law (including Law, Civil and Commercial Law, International Rule of Law, etc.)
- Accounting (including Accounting, Certified Public Accountant, Financial Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Economics and Trade (including International Economics and Trade, Trade Economics)
- Digital Economy.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Management Science and Engineering (Big Data direction, including Information Management and Information Systems, Big Data Management and Application)
- Insurance.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (9040–10040), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Economics and Trade, Digital Economy) as the main direction, use Tier 1 majors (Law, Accounting) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Management Science and Engineering, Insurance) as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<9040), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>10040), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety.

_translation.university_name_en: Zhongnan University of Economics and Law
